# PR 5b ‚Äî Concepts Canonicalization ‚Äî Rehearsal Evidence

**Probe file:** `docs/plans/pr5b-concepts-verification-probes.sql` (probes a, b, c, d‚Ä≤, e, f per
design ¬ß4.8 ‚Äî no probe (d) filter-reach analog: concepts is not a filter field; d‚Ä≤ subject-key
integrity replaces it).
**Artifact:** `data/vocab/academic-concepts.vocab.json` (source_commit `f3f050f0`, emitted 2026-06-11).
**Migration:** `supabase/migrations/20260612000000_pr5b_concepts_canonicalization.sql` (generated by
`scripts/generate-concepts-rewrite-migration.py`).

All probes scope live rows (`retired_at IS NULL`) and read `metadata->'academicConcepts'` only
(concepts has NO flat column). Identifiers in probes are generated mechanically from the artifact
JSON; the probe file's literal lists were diffed against both the artifact and the migration
(exact match: 119 canonical labels, 201 alias pairs, 7 drops, 208-literal union lists, and the
probe (f) statement is the migration's section (2) verbatim).

## Tier 1 ‚Äî Local rehearsal (2026-06-11, Task B.2) ‚úÖ

Done as part of B.2 (commit `442fb70`); 5-row seed exercises trigger paths, not coverage.
Three edge shapes seeded and verified: (i) fold-collision dedup
(`{"Science": ["adaptations","adaptation","garden topics"]}` ‚Üí `{"Science": ["Adaptations"]}`),
(ii) full-empty (`{"Science": ["garden topics"]}` ‚Üí `academicConcepts` key removed),
(iii) cross-subject literal rewrites under both keys with no cross-subject dedup. FTS
regenerated (search_vector changed in-statement); re-running the UPDATE matched 0 rows
(idempotency); post-verify DO block passed; backup row preserved originals.
